tdd-state-machine.name: tdd-state-machine
tdd-state-machine.summary: Hardens TDD discipline by defining tdd_state transitions, drift detection, and the context block for spawned subagents.

contract.name: contract
contract.summary: Meta-feature owning all cross-feature templates, schemas, dispatch scripts, and enforcement checks (hard-rules R1-R7, naming-convention).

policy.name: policy
policy.summary: Canonical rule files fed to subagents; split of work-guide.md and philosophy.md.

rabbit-cage.name: rabbit-cage
rabbit-cage.summary: Owns the entire Claude Code surface and all user-facing capabilities: hooks, commands, scripts for bug-filing, scaffolding, project management, and installation.
